name: Fitness Buddy
description: Personal coach 'Buddy': logs meals (text/voice/photo with OpenAI vision), workouts and body measurements; tracks calories, macros and hydration; sets goals; generates personalized multi-week training plans (using real wger.de exercises, no LLM hallucination); gives daily/weekly summaries with streak tracking and proactive reminders. Requires the v1.6 fitness schema (run setup.sh --force on n8n-claw to apply).

credentials_required.label: OpenAI API Key
credentials_required.hint: Used for meal photo analysis (gpt-4o-mini vision) and structured workout/insight extraction. Get one at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

tools.name: fitness_profile
tools.description: Manage the user's fitness profile (age, sex, height, weight, goals, allergies). Auto-computes daily kcal target and macros via Mifflin-St-Jeor BMR + activity multiplier

tools.name: log_meal
tools.description: Log a meal — from text description, voice transcript, photo (with vision analysis), barcode, or saved meal memory. Auto-resolves nutrition via OpenFoodFacts

tools.name: meal_memory
tools.description: Personal meal cache — list/save/delete frequently eaten meals for one-click logging

tools.name: suggest_meal
tools.description: Suggest a next meal that fits the remaining macro budget for today (respects dietary restrictions and allergies)

tools.name: log_workout
tools.description: Log a workout (running, strength, cycling, etc.). Auto-extracts type/duration/intensity from text or voice; estimates calories burned via MET formula

tools.name: log_body
tools.description: Log body measurements (weight, body fat, circumferences) and view trends with moving averages

tools.name: log_hydration
tools.description: Log water intake and check progress against daily target

tools.name: goals
tools.description: Manage fitness goals (target weight, weekly workout count, streaks, etc.). Auto-tracks progress as logs come in

tools.name: summary
tools.description: Daily, weekly, or monthly fitness report — calories vs target, macros, workouts, hydration, streak, highlights

tools.name: training_plan
tools.description: Generate or manage a multi-week training plan using real wger.de exercises. Supports custom LLM-generated plans, today's session, marking sessions complete, and deload adjustments

tools.name: reminders
tools.description: Set up recurring fitness reminders (morning meal nudge, workout reminders, weekly report). Stored as scheduled_actions and fired by the heartbeat

tools.name: insights
tools.description: Analyze the last 30 days of logs and surface patterns/recommendations (e.g. 'you eat 30% more carbs on weekends'). Stored in memory_long for the agent to recall

tools.name: export
tools.description: Export meals, workouts, body measurements or hydration as CSV for a date range

tools.name: nutrition_lookup
tools.description: Stand-alone nutrition lookup via OpenFoodFacts (barcode or name) without logging

author: freddy-schuetz
